config.cfg_repr: V2Params(exposure_mapping='percentile', logistic_midpoint=0.0, logistic_steepness=0.6, cognitive_feasibility=0.3, physical_feasibility=0.1, robotics_maturity=0.0, adoption=1.0, adoption_path=[np.float64(0.02), np.float64(0.05111111111111111), np.float64(0.08222222222222221), np.float64(0.11333333333333333), np.float64(0.14444444444444443), np.float64(0.17555555555555552), np.float64(0.20666666666666664), np.float64(0.23777777777777773), np.float64(0.26888888888888884), np.float64(0.3)], robotics_cognitive_coupling=0.0, robotics_lag=6.0, robotics_base=1.0, sector_adoption_mult=1.0, sector_adoption_ceiling=1.0, task_job_passthrough=1.0, retained_profit_share=0.55, price_reduction_share=0.25, survivor_gains_share=0.19999999999999996, auto_cost=0.1, offshore_share=0.0, compute_effective_rate=0.27, ui_weeks=26, reabsorption_rate=0.6, reabsorption_rung=1, reemployment_haircut=0.1, reabsorption_floor_pctile=0.3, reab_wage_baumol=0.0, reab_wage_crowding=0.0, lfp_exit_rate=0.02, survivor_elasticity=0.1, survivor_raise_ceiling=1.5, survivor_spillover_to_profit=0.5, mpc=0.95, consumption_stickiness=1.0, marginal_taxable_multiplier=1.0, demand_multiplier=0.3, price_passthrough=0.3, productivity_passthrough=0.5, denominator='absolute', automation_tax_rate=0.0051, attrition_rate=0.025, ssdi_annual=18000.0, baseline_growth_rate=0.045, income_tax_mult=1.0, corp_tax_mult=1.0, cons_tax_mult=1.0, ubi_recapture_rate=0.25, surplus_capture=1.0, dividend_tax_rate=0.188, passthrough_individual_rate=0.25, state_response='mix', state_cut_share=0.0, state_rate_hike_cap=1.0, interest_rate=0.03, ubi_annual=0.0, swf_profit_share=0.2, fed_vat_rate=0.05, corp_offset_scale=1.0, consumption_scale=1.0, n_periods=10)
overlay_notes: GRT transitional robot tax (decade 1): 5.1% ad-valorem × auto_cost 10% → automation_tax_rate = 0.0051 of the saved compensation bill
Compute-pool parity tax: effective rate 0.27 (Windfall capital ETR 26.7%) vs the 0.05 post-TCJA status quo
SWF: the government holds a 20% equity share of after-corporate-tax automation profit — revenue scales automatically with the shock (the insurance property)
Federal VAT: 5% on a consumption base of two-thirds of value added, eroding with the standing income withdrawal (no behavioral response modeled)

grounding.debt_stock: ≈ 6.7 extra years of the FY2025 federal deficit — an improvement against what CBO projects
grounding.fed_deficit_flow: ≈ 0.8× annual Social Security outlays, every year — an improvement against what CBO projects
grounding.real_gdp: ≈ 1.5 years of normal (~2%/yr) real growth, arriving all at once

overlay_readouts.name: Sovereign wealth fund — 20% of AI profits
